title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Om Book Shop

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Om Book Shop
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Om Book Shop in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Om Book Shop:
Om Book Shop is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Book Shop!
